character_buff.name: Dark Penalty
character_buff.description: Active the inherent magical force to those who attack you.

skills.name: Strike Back
skills.description: Blows an enemy away with a powerful psychokinetic attack.

skills.name: Web
skills.description: Immobilize all enemies within range by pinning them to the ground.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 5.5m away and within a 4m radius

skills.name: Earthquake
skills.description: Throws enemies violently into the air by creating a powerful earthquake.

skills.name: Apocalypse
skills.description: Concentrates all dark energy in the area into a powerful attack that consumes everything in its path.

skills.name: Anti-Magic Shell
skills.description: Grants the allies powerful Elemental Protection.

skills.name: Protection Field
skills.description: Grants a powerful defensive field to friendly forces. However you cant use items.

skills.name: Dispel Magic
skills.description: Removes all buffs and curses on team members and on all enemies around you and decreases SP Recovery for a while.

skills.target: Up to 9 allies including squad member within a range of 8m

skills.description: Control a dark energy to change gravity to attack from beneath the enemys feet.

skills.name: Triple Element
skills.description: Converts the three attributes rapidly to attack enemies.

100% chance to inflict [Magical Piercing] on enemy.

skills.description: Turns the sleeping dark energy on the ground to beads and burn the ground in a range.
